caption: A man with dark skin and glasses wears a white long-sleeved shirt with suspenders, a red bow tie, and a grey, spiked wig. He is wearing black over-ear headphones and speaking into a black microphone. The setting is a room with walls covered in framed photographs and some clothing items, including a shirt with "LEE" written on it. A logo for "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST" appears on the screen. Throughout the sequence, the man remains in the same position, speaking and blinking, while his facial expressions shift slightly as he talks. The background and equipment remain static, with the man's head and mouth moving slightly as he continues his speech.
